calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-13-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Dean Schmidt, Esq. appeared with petitioner Alison Elizabeth Sant, who was present to change her own name, and as Guardian ad litem for the minor Ben Sant Johnson, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Alison Elizabeth Sant-Johnson.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Ben Sant-Johnson.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-29-2008 Reset To Jan-13-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-18-2008 Reset To Dec-30-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
